query:
INSERT INTO municipalities (codigo_ibge, nome, uf, populacao)
SELECT DISTINCT 
  codigoMunicipio as codigo_ibge,
  nomeMunicipio as nome,
  uf,
  NULL as populacao
FROM candidate_zone_results
WHERE codigoMunicipio IS NOT NULL AND nomeMunicipio IS NOT NULL
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE nome = VALUES(nome);
